title: salvia verbenaca subsp. multifida
intro: Salvia verbenaca subsp. multifida, also known as multifid leafed clary sage, is a subspecies of the verbena family of plants and is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Salvia verbenaca subsp. multifida include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues, and its antiseptic properties, which aid in wound healing. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate stress and anxiety, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Salvia verbenaca subsp. multifida can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
